title: Outpost onboard-primitive command output
description: Schema for the --json output of the v0.4 onboard primitives (outpost db create / seal-from-template / manifest scaffold). One object per invocation. Stable across patch and minor versions.

step.description: Which onboard primitive produced this result.

detail.description: Human-readable one-line summary of the outcome.

written_files.description: Files created or overwritten by this invocation. Empty for db create and for no-op reruns.

next_action.description: Suggested next step for a human or AI agent.
